metadata.name: Investigate and Resolve SELinux Issues
metadata.description: Troubleshoot SELinux issues by using SELinux log analysis tools and interpreting their output
objectives: Gain experience with SELinux troubleshooting tools
Use sealert and ausearch to diagnose SELinux denials
Resolve SELinux issues by applying correct file contexts
prerequisites: Understanding of SELinux contexts and troubleshooting

hosts.name: servera
hosts.description: Web server with SELinux issues to troubleshoot

tasks.name: Verify /custom directory exists
tasks.description: The /custom directory should exist for web content
hints: The lab setup should have created this directory

tasks.name: Verify /custom/index.html exists
tasks.description: The index.html file should exist in /custom
tasks.failure_message: index.html is missing or has incorrect content
hints: Create the file: echo 'This is SERVERA.' | sudo tee /custom/index.html

tasks.name: Verify SELinux file context rule for /custom
tasks.description: An SELinux file context rule should exist for /custom with httpd_sys_content_t
tasks.success_message: SELinux file context rule is configured for /custom
tasks.failure_message: SELinux file context rule is missing for /custom
hints: Add the rule: sudo semanage fcontext -a -t httpd_sys_content_t '/custom(/.*)?'
This defines the context policy for the directory

tasks.name: Verify /custom has httpd_sys_content_t context
tasks.description: The /custom directory should have the httpd_sys_content_t SELinux context

tasks.name: Verify /custom/index.html has httpd_sys_content_t context
tasks.description: The index.html file should have the httpd_sys_content_t SELinux context
tasks.failure_message: index.html does not have httpd_sys_content_t context

tasks.name: Verify web content is accessible via HTTP
tasks.description: The web page at http://servera/index.html should return the expected content
tasks.success_message: Web content is accessible - SELinux issue resolved
tasks.failure_message: Web content is not accessible - SELinux issue may persist
hints: Check httpd status: sudo systemctl status httpd
Review sealert for any remaining issues: sudo sealert -a /var/log/audit/audit.log
